description_long: This is a beige, four-wheeled combat tactical vehicle with a boxy, armored body and reinforced doors. The vehicle features a prominent roof-mounted machine gun turret, accessible via a hatch, and a long radio antenna at the rear. Its exterior is rugged, with visible dirt and wear, suggesting heavy use in challenging environments. The windows are small and likely bullet-resistant, and the tires are large, thick, and designed for off-road mobility. The front grille is robust, with protective bars and a utilitarian design. The vehicle's overall appearance emphasizes durability, protection, and combat readiness.
description: A beige, armored combat tactical vehicle with a roof-mounted machine gun, reinforced doors, and large off-road tires.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, four doors, roof-mounted machine gun, and long rear antenna.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back door, taillights, and the rear end of the roof-mounted weapon.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with visible doors, machine gun, and antenna.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the armored grille, headlights, and the forward-facing machine gun.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible roof-mounted machine gun mount located centrally on the roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body visible armor plating, including reinforced doors and sloped panels; thickness appears substantial, with no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid beige color with some weathering; no distinct camouflage pattern visible.
attribute_tire_type: Four large off-road tires with deep tread pattern, suitable for rugged terrain; no visible chains or special reinforcements.
